title: Creamy Greek Onions Bowl
description: Umami, creamy, weeknight Greek dish featuring onions, bulgur, and a tangy feta sauce. This hearty bowl is perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes, or until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the bulgur and cook for 2 minutes, or until it is lightly toasted.
Add the Greek yogurt, feta cheese, lemon juice, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the chopped parsley, if using.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the onion and bulgur mixture in the bottom of a bowl, followed by a dollop of the creamy feta sauce.
